question: What is the spatial relation between the group of people and the empty chair? Select from the following options: (A) The people are sitting on the chair.. (B) The people are behind the chair.. (C) The chair is in front of the people.. (D) The chair is behind the people..
gold_answer: The chair is behind the people
answer_choices: The people are sitting on the chair
The people are behind the chair
The chair is in front of the people
The chair is behind the people

qwen_prompt_object.inpaint_prompt: A large empty chair positioned in front of the group of people on the lawn.
qwen_prompt_object.negative_prompt: The chair is behind the people or not visible in the scene.

inpaint_prompt_used: A large empty chair positioned in front of the group of people on the lawn.
negative_prompt_used: The chair is behind the people or not visible in the scene.
